transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Health Navigator line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a referral to a cardiologist. Dr. Sanjay Patel wants me to see one for my heart palpitations.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can you give me your member ID number, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, I have your member ID as 8-4-7-2-1-9-8. Let me pull up your account.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see a referral request from Dr. Patel dated last week. Would you like me to send that to Cascade Cardiology Group?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, that's the one. Can you tell me if I need a new prescription card first?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No new card needed, your existing coverage applies. I'll submit the referral now and you should get a confirmation by email.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, thank you so much for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good day.
